subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One makes mention of him who hath turned unto God, the Single One, the All-Knowing, Who hath come with the truth and revealed that which was hidden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یذکر المظلوم من اقبل الی الله الفرد العلیم الذی اتی بالحق و اظهر ما کان مکنونا
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution
